# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  DEPLOY_ENV: "production"

before_script:
  - export MR_TITLE=$(curl --silent --show-error --request GET --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GITLAB_TOKEN" "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" | jq -r .title)
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(curl --silent --show-error --request GET --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GITLAB_TOKEN" "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" | jq -r .description)

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - echo "Merge Request Title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Merge Request Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Application built for MR: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to $DEPLOY_ENV..."
    - echo "Using build from MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - # Deployment commands here
  when: manual
  only:
    - master

release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
    - echo "Release Notes for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - git tag -a "v$(date +'%Y%m%d%H%M%S')-$MR_TITLE" -m "Release for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin --tags
  only:
    - master
